content: +guides

Please be sure to check out our <#1304022827824844842>  section! Here are a few resources, tips, and walkthroughs to help you master the game:


- [Morimens Compendium](<https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1TCU7LJRzqKeuvLe97y_TfGZ-j6jq5bZX6hskAAJ2mFQ/edit?gid=167686509#gid=167686509>) by Mythag University
- [Game Mechanics](https://discordapp.com/channels/1131791637933199470/1417994340177022981) by Mythag University
- [Store Guide](https://discordapp.com/channels/1131791637933199470/1442292634575175710) by Mythag University
- [Damage Formula](https://discordapp.com/channels/1131791637933199470/1384463374213189652) by Jynn             
- [How To Aliemus 101 & 102](https://discordapp.com/channels/1131791637933199470/1387172781829128304) by Jynn  
- [Morimens New Players Handbook](https://discord.com/channels/1131791637933199470/1477730088299663431) by Cheri
- [Boss Compendium](https://discord.com/channels/1131791637933199470/1489244885025292328) by Mythag University
- [Compilation of guide videos](<https://docs.google.com/document/d/1bnnR--yNl6r5cMljPoEF4bXC9HIoSK_WNUG7ucYGO6A/edit?usp=sharing>) by Kaly
the team of caecus tulu goliath nautila has no good dps and no good shielder
all 3 of caecus, tulu, and goliath do some damage
but not as much as if you had a meta dps
and they dont really synergize
i guess tulu can buff goliath?
aigis and thais are extremely strong supports
and aequor/caro gives you both white stance and crimson furnace which helps with surviving
Looking at your box i see you have both miryam and murphy, these are 2 of the best aequor supports in the game
Murphy is the way to go if u are having problems surviving
I suggest a team of goliath aigis thais murphy
Use goliath as main dps and focus on stacking str
In terms of poison, the only good poison dps i see you own is liz
but e0 liz is kinda bad
If you pull faros, she can be used as a poison dps
and works very well with miryam
Thank you, Cheri! I’ll give that team comp a shot. And thank you for putting together the new players handbook, a lot of great stuff on there!
Any DPS you recommend pulling for using the standard banner?

Hello! Sorry for the late reply, life's been busy <:dizzy:1356053061508010156> I managed A3 on a few waves!! I also got more characters and enlightens in the meantime so was able to change around some teams a bit (for example, my Liz is still lv1 (I farm exp mats but it still takes so long to level up my characters!!), so I had to make do with what I had...) I really appreciate your help, I was able to clear because of the time you put in ❤️ Thank you <:lotan_proud:1468258456006955010>
You should focus on limited characters that you like
Standard characters are viable but u will notice the power difference, u will struggle more
u will have a much easier time if u pick a limited carry and build around them
and then u can use standards to fill in the gaps if u want

Hi, I have been playing for about 3 weeks now and I made it to Arc 2 about 2 days ago and wanted some advice on what to do.

Some additional context, I have been able to get to Arc 2 Stage 1-7, but started to struggle with the fights (mainly survivability it seems). My current team is Vortice, Murphy, Sanga, Celeste. I also think I lack of actual carry/build around units. I was wondering what I should do? 

1. Is there a way to increase my Max HP besides Soulforge and Character levels? 
My total Max HP is 752 meaning I have way less leeway on surviving big hits. Mainly asking because I see a lot of team comps with 2x my Max HP when I check the Records for stage clears, but Covenants shouldn't impact that and most Wheels don't increase HP

2. Should I farm Exp Potions? 
Currently using the Menophin just for Covenants and the Events, but I am severely lacking on Exp Potions which I am not sure if that is something worth/efficient to farm

3. For my current team, I currently am thinking is it worth replacing Celeste for another support, Thais or Horla or anyone else?
My thought process is Thais for more keyflare/exalt spam/duping cards & Caro Furnace heal vs Horla for more exalt spam/hand + arithmetica retaining & Ultra Round which I believe should reduce the cooldown on the Divine Aequor mechanics. Don't have enough Exp Pots to level many characters at the moment, so wanted some advice if it was worth using either of them. The current downside is I will lose Pure Aequor which I am not sure if that matters that much.

4. Should I go for Kath E3 or GDoll E0+?
Some things I was considering was Arachne coming out and it seems like I should at bare minimum get E0 or E2+ (if I have enough remaining pulls) since she seems good.
I have a lot of her supports that run with Kath so it wouldn't be bad, but I would have to pull 4x copies which seem rough. I am currently lacking carry/build around characters so I think it would be fine to pull.
GDoll was another option I was considering since she seems good, but I think I lack a strong poison team to work with her well (maybe could do GDoll, Lily, Nymphaea, Keyflare Bot? for a decent team) and I heard she only really shines at higher enlightens

5. Is it worth pulling a single copy of Tulu/GDoll 1x Wheel?
Both seem good for more exalt spamming which in general should be good for any comp or even my current Vortice comp, but wanted a second opinion. I am also not sure if having only one copy will even matter too much for pushing especially since I can only equip a single SSR wheel and I am already using good ones
I ended up getting Kath so will look at your guide and try to build around her 🙂 thank you!
